description: Style NoteCheck out shoes for men from globalite. Globalite offers casual shoes in different styles which can go well with any outfit. Team these shoes with denims and a stylish tee to up your style quotient. It's not only women who like to experiment with the shape, styles and colours of their footwear as now, men are not far behind. Product DetailsGreyish green shoe with central lace-ups, synthetic overlays and stitched detailingPadded tongue and inner (mesh)Thick rubber midsoleTPU outsole with branched and honeycomb grooves on the forefoot and horizontal grooves on the midfoot and heel The shoes come with a bag to help you pack them when you travelMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
